I agree with the assessment provided in option B. An overindulgent environment often leads to a lack of discipline and structure, which can result in children displaying aggressive behavior as a means to get their needs met or to assert control. Additionally, such environments do not typically foster emotional regulation skills, leading to frequent outbursts and temper tantrums. Therefore, my agreement aligns closely with the chosen answer.
